name: Pineapple Cream Cheese Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Frozen bread dough (1 loaf), thawed and cut in half
Grated peel and juice from 1 Lemon
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 16
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Press dough into 2 greased 12-inch pizza pans.
3. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese, sugar, flour, egg yolks, 1 teaspoon lemon peel, and 2 teaspoons lemon juice until smooth.
4. Stir in crushed pineapple. Spread mixture evenly over pizzas, leaving at least 1/2 inch from the edges.
5. Bake for 15 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from oven and spread each pizza with strawberry jam.
7. Sprinkle sliced almonds on top.
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
